title: career-ops.scanner.cycle_completed v1
description: Emitted by scan.mjs (the zero-token portal scanner) after a full scan cycle across tracked_companies finishes. Mirrors the console summary block scan.mjs prints ('Portal Scan — <date>'). Consumers use this to track scan cadence and new-posting throughput without parsing logs.

companies_scanned.description: Count of non-board tracked_companies entries scanned this cycle.

boards_scanned.description: Count of job-board (_isBoard) entries scanned this cycle.

total_found.description: Total raw postings returned by providers before any filtering.

expired_verified.description: Postings dropped after Playwright liveness verification found them expired.

migrated.description: Postings rediscovered at a new URL and migrated forward.

new_offers.description: Net new offers written to the Pending section after all filtering and verification.

duration_ms.description: Wall-clock duration of the scan cycle in milliseconds.

dry_run.description: true if the cycle ran with --dry-run (no files written).
